# pheno-config

> Canonical typed-config loader for the pheno-* fleet. 12-factor
> `combine()` that overlays env over TOML/JSON.

## Location

Source-of-truth repo: `KooshaPari/Configra` (workspace member
`crates/pheno-config/`). Absorbed 2026-06-18 (ADR-031 follow-up,
L5-104.7).

## Files

- `Cargo.toml` — package manifest (v0.2.0)
- `src/lib.rs` — library root (Config struct, ConfigBuilder, loaders, combine())
- `tests/config_test.rs` — unit tests for env/JSON loaders + ConfigBuilder
- `tests/toml_merge_test.rs` — TOML parsing, merge semantics, combine precedence
- `docs/twelve-factor.md` — 12-factor contract deep-dive
- `README.md` — API surface, env-var names, error type, versioning
- `AGENTS.md` — agent context (with migration table)
- `WORKLOG.md` — change history (v2.1 schema)
- `CHANGELOG.md` — release notes
- `LICENSE-MIT` / `LICENSE-APACHE` — dual license

## Conventions

- Conventional Commits (`feat:`, `fix:`, `chore:`, `docs:`, `refactor:`)
- rustfmt + clippy (`-D warnings`)
- 80% lib coverage gate
- TOML/JSON/env parsing; `thiserror` for error types
